music_hall_build.title: Build a dedicated music hall — minimum 10×10 structure with Jukeboxes, Note Blocks, and Xerca instruments

etched_disc.title: Record a custom Etched disc — use the Etched mod recording mechanic to create a unique music disc

subtitle.text: Etched records. Xerca plays. The hall is the space between the recording and the listening. Build it properly.

description: CH.16 · THE MUSIC HALL
▸ The kingdom builds music halls for the same reason
it builds roads and farms.
Function: cultural anchor, morale, documentation.
The music hall is the kingdom's memory of sound.
Etched records the sound. Xerca plays it live.
The hall is where both happen.
◈ ETCHED: CUSTOM MUSIC DISCS
└ Etched mod: allows recording audio as custom music discs
└ Recording mechanic: Etched adds a recording device/block
that captures sounds from the environment or Note Blocks
└ Disc creation: recorded audio → pressed onto blank disc
(blank disc likely requires iron/gold + paper — check JEI: etched:)
└ Playback: custom discs play in vanilla Jukeboxes
└ Storage: disc wall (item frames + Jukeboxes) in the hall
◈ XERCA: PLAYABLE INSTRUMENTS
└ Instruments: Guitar, Lute, Flute, and others
(check JEI for xerca: instrument recipes)
└ Play mechanic: hold instrument + right-click to play notes
WASD/keys map to musical notes (varies by instrument)
└ Multiplayer: multiple players on instruments = ensemble
└ Display: place instruments on item frames or stands in hall
◈ MUSIC HALL DESIGN
└ Minimum: 10×10 interior with raised stage area
└ Stage: Note Block array + Xerca instruments + Etched recorder
└ Seating: stairs or slabs arranged as audience seats
└ Disc wall: item frames with all custom discs + vanilla discs
└ Lighting: End Rods (thematic) or lanterns for warm tone
└ Material: Oak + Stripped Logs + Bookshelf wall = acoustic room
▸ The kingdom does not remember only its wars.
It remembers its music.
Every civilization in Sinborn documented technology.
None of them documented music.
You are the first to build a music hall.
The hall says: we were here, and we played.
That is different from the other things that say we were here.',
▶ Build a dedicated music hall [check]
▶ Record a custom Etched disc [check]
◇ Xerca instruments can be played on horseback or while standing.
Build a performance stage with all four instrument types.
One player can cycle through them during a session.
The music hall is a roleplaying anchor for the kingdom.
Not a mechanical requirement.
The most important buildings rarely are.
